latest.title: Ring-tailed lemur's sunbathing trick decoded
latest.script_key: this tail isn t just for show see that thick black stripe it s packed with blood vessels right under the fur that s why they hold it out like a solar panel without it they d freeze in madagascar s nights because they don t store much fat would you survive a night like that

latest.title: Why dog play is more serious than it looks in the first second
latest.script_key: dogs use play to practice timing trust and control watch the first second the body pauses then the first playful move gives the clue in this clip the recovery angle is white dog in snowy the clue is not the cute part it is the timing of the movement that visible cue is the whole story so the short opens on the dog instead of stretching the setup that makes the short feel observed not copied

latest.title: Ring-tailed lemurs sunbathe with built-in sunscreen
latest.script_key: they re not just lounging their striped tails don t just look cool they re chemical sunscreen dispensers because they coat the tail in oil from a scent gland then sling it over their head like a blanket that s why they can bake in midday sun for hours without burning

latest.title: Dogs build a map with smell
latest.script_key: dogs build a map with smell watch the nose before the feet because every sniff samples layers of scent dogs can learn who passed where they moved and what changed since the last check the ground is basically a news feed what should they sniff next

latest.title: Turtles carry a magnetic map home
